benchmark_intent: Top one or two AI empires plausibly 25x-crisis-ready by 2350 without hidden bonuses; minimum research-scale target is roughly 6000+ monthly research by 2350, with eventual crisis fleet preparation in the tens of millions.
patch_under_test: staid_shipyard_payoff_ready monthly alloys threshold lowered from >150 to >100 after observer-20260707T090209Z 2350 evidence showed mid-tier empires with >100 alloys and very low fleets.
